compute.description:
Searches for "Lagerhaus Tamsweg" and computes a route. Waits 15 seconds, then presses the back button to return to the map.

Repeats 100×.

search.description:
Searches for "market horlbeck" (Charleston), "kam kreta ayer" (Singapore) and "duomo di milano" (Milan), each time selecting the first result and tapping X to return to typing.

Repeats 100×.

fg_bg.name: Foreground to Background
fg_bg.description:
Opens com.google.android.calendar via `adb shell monkey`, sleeps for 25 seconds, then brings com.sygic.profi.beta back to the foreground via `adb shell am start ... NaviNativeActivity`.

Repeats 100×.

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description:
Searches for a coordinate, taps the first result, opens the zoom controls and zooms out 20× then back in 20×.

Repeats the zoom sequence 100×.

demonstrate.description: Searches for coordinates near Düsseldorf (Germany), computes a long route, presses Demonstrate route, and lets the simulated drive run for a fixed duration before cancelling.

recompute_offroute.description:
Computes a long route from the device's location to Paris, then starts a Mock Locations saved-route preset that pulls the GPS feed backwards across the planned route. The constant off-route position forces Sygic to repeatedly recompute, exercising the recompute memory paths.

Requires the Mock Locations app (ru.gavrikov.mocklocations) configured with a saved route, and Developer Options → Select mock location app → Mock Locations.

Runs for 10 hours.
